name: Morticia a Ovelha
description:
Morticia a Ovelha (translated to: Morticia the Sheep) is the bootleg version of Baba Chops in the Animais Felizes franchise.

Overview: The Evil Doers/Os Mal Feitores' black sheep, Morticia, prefers to stay in her own space, being very distant, quiet, serious and mysterious among everyone else, preferring to be alone at home instead of going out on high antics. But she has some very persistent friends, who cheer her up for a while, so that she can soon return to her routine.
creator: Touille the Trash Rodent
